name: Kenji Sato
description:
♡ "Taking me so well, baby." || It's your first time with him and he talks you through it.

(FEM!USER)

I keep seeing people on tiktok say "Kenji talks you through it" AND I HAD TO MAKE A BOT FOR ITTTTT

FAQs

The bot keeps talking for me!

♡ It could be that your messages are too short! Undetailed or lazy replies can often make the bot speak for you because it needs something to work with. Or it could be an issue with the bot itself. Believe me, I've tried multiple times to get it to not do that by scripting that it must not talk for you. There's really nothing I can do about it..

The bot keeps repeating itself!

♡ Try playing around with the generation settings! You can turn the temp to .85 and the tokens at 800, it'll get better.

The bot keeps misgendering me!

♡ Just try regenerating and editing the response, the bot will eventually get it.

And if all fails, then there's nothing I can do about it.. ^^; I'm also facing these issues myself. There's just times where the LLM starts tweaking lol

Are your bots gender neutral?

♡ Yes! Unless stated otherwise. My bots are tagged with “AnyPOV” (For both male and female users)

Do you take requests?

♡ When I feel like it, yes, I'll do bot requests. But please be aware that I'm quite picky with requests, and I may not always be able to do them. You can drop your requests/suggestions here!
creator: leeflms
